case_title: MICHAEL KHAZAN VS. EPHRAIM MANLAPAZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100098619)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAZAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MANLAPAZ, EPHRAIM MANLAPAZ, ELMA DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-05-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-13-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-05-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-18-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-28-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
